data.title: Fountain Set Announces Final Dividend for 2024
data.description:
Fountain Set (Holdings) Limited ( (HK:0420) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Fountain Set (Holdings) Limited has announced a final cash dividend of HKD 0.0116 per share for the financial year ending 31 December 2024, with the payment date set for 30 June 2025. This announcement reflects the company’s commitment to returning value to its shareholders and may impact its financial positioning and stakeholder relations positively.

More about Fountain Set (Holdings) Limited

Fountain Set (Holdings) Limited operates in the textile industry, focusing on the production and distribution of knitted fabrics and garments. The company serves a global market, providing high-quality textile products to various sectors.

data.title: Grieg Seafood ASA Sets New Bond Interest Rate
data.description:
Grieg Seafood ASA ( (GRGSF) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Grieg Seafood ASA has announced a new bond interest rate of 7.93% for its Senior Unsecured Green Bond Issue for the period from March 25, 2025, to June 25, 2025. This adjustment, made in accordance with the bond agreement, is part of the company’s ongoing financial management and reflects its commitment to sustainable investment practices.

More about Grieg Seafood ASA

Grieg Seafood ASA is a company operating in the seafood industry, primarily focusing on sustainable aquaculture and the production of farmed salmon. The company is known for its commitment to environmental, social, and governance (ESG) principles, which is reflected in its financial instruments such as green bonds.

data.title: Manulife Financial Files Key Documents with SEC
data.description:
An announcement from Manulife Financial ( (TSE:MFC) ) is now available.

On March 21, 2025, Manulife Financial Corporation filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, which included several important documents such as the 2024 Annual Report, Notice of Annual Meeting of Shareholders, and Management Information Circular. This filing is significant as it provides shareholders and stakeholders with critical information regarding the company’s past performance and future plans, potentially impacting investor decisions and the company’s market positioning.

More about Manulife Financial

Manulife Financial Corporation is a leading international financial services group that operates primarily in the insurance and wealth management industries. The company provides financial advice, insurance, and wealth and asset management solutions for individuals, groups, and institutions. Headquartered in Toronto, Canada, Manulife serves millions of customers across Canada, Asia, and the United States, focusing on delivering strong, reliable, trustworthy, and forward-thinking solutions.

data.title: ELEVAI Labs Inc. Considers Further Share Repurchases
data.description:
ELEVAI Labs Inc. ( (ELAB) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 18, 2025, PMGC Holdings Inc. repurchased shares from existing shareholders who directly contacted the company, with the transaction closing on the same day. The company announced on March 21, 2025, that it may consider further repurchases from other investors, depending on market conditions, but it is not conducting a formal share repurchase program.

More about ELEVAI Labs Inc.

PMGC Holdings Inc. is a diversified holding company that manages and grows its portfolio through strategic acquisitions, investments, and development across various industries. The company currently owns three wholly owned subsidiaries: Northstrive Biosciences Inc., PMGC Research Inc., and PMGC Capital LLC, and is committed to exploring opportunities in multiple sectors to maximize growth and value.

data.title: KWG Group Renews Property Lease Agreements in Major Chinese Cities
data.description:
An update from KWG Group Holdings ( (HK:1813) ) is now available.

KWG Group Holdings Limited has announced the renewal of its property lease agreements for various commercial properties in Guangzhou and Shanghai. These agreements, effective from March 21, 2025, involve connected transactions due to the involvement of Mr. Kong, an executive director and CEO of the company, who indirectly owns the lessees. The transactions are subject to certain reporting and review requirements under the Hong Kong Listing Rules but do not require independent shareholders’ approval.

More about KWG Group Holdings

KWG Group Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, primarily involved in property development and investment. It operates in the real estate sector, focusing on commercial properties in major Chinese cities such as Guangzhou and Shanghai.

data.title: Global InterConnection Group Considers Subsidiary Acquisition Proposal
data.description:
An update from Global InterConnection Group Limited ( (NL:CABLE) ) is now available.

Global InterConnection Group Limited has announced that a potential offer for its shares will not be pursued. Instead, a proposal has been received to acquire its subsidiary, GIG Services SA, which is involved in the Atlantic SuperConnection project. This acquisition would lead to a change of control for GIG Services SA. The board is considering this proposal, ensuring it aligns with their strategy to raise substantial funds for the project’s development. The board remains open to other offers and aims to maximize shareholder value, with the controlling shareholders supporting reasonable offers. This proposal is not expected to result in the company’s delisting.

More about Global InterConnection Group Limited

Global InterConnection Group Limited operates in the energy sector, focusing on interconnection services. The company is involved in projects like the Atlantic SuperConnection and is listed on Euronext Amsterdam and The International Stock Exchange.

data.title: Insulet Closes $450 Million Senior Notes Issuance
data.description:
An announcement from Insulet ( (PODD) ) is now available.

On March 20, 2025, Insulet Corporation closed its issuance and sale of $450 million in 6.50% Senior Notes due 2033, with net proceeds expected to be approximately $444 million. Additionally, Insulet entered into a Seventh Amendment to its Credit Agreement, extending the maturity of revolving credit commitments to March 20, 2030, and increasing the commitments to $500 million. The company also engaged in Note Repurchase Transactions, repurchasing $419 million of its Convertible Senior Notes due 2026, which will impact its outstanding debt and potentially influence stock market activities.

More about Insulet

Insulet Corporation operates in the medical device industry, primarily focusing on the development and sale of innovative insulin delivery systems. The company is known for its Omnipod Insulin Management System, which offers a tubeless, wearable insulin pump for individuals with diabetes.

data.title: Hong Leong Asia’s Sky Cloud Subsidiary Launches Equity Incentive Scheme
data.description:
The latest update is out from Hong Leong Asia ( (SG:H22) ).

Hong Leong Asia Ltd. has announced the implementation of an equity incentive scheme by its Chinese subsidiary, Sky Cloud. This scheme involves increasing Sky Cloud’s registered capital by RMB1.25 million, equivalent to a 20% interest in the enlarged capital. The initiative aims to enhance stakeholder engagement and align interests, potentially strengthening the company’s position in the Chinese market. The scheme will be executed in two phases, with completion expected by June 2027, and is anticipated to have a positive impact on the company’s operational and strategic objectives.

More about Hong Leong Asia

Hong Leong Asia Ltd. is a diversified industrial conglomerate based in Singapore, with operations spanning across various sectors. The company, along with its subsidiaries, focuses on manufacturing and distributing products such as diesel engines and building materials, with a significant market presence in China.

data.title: China Pacific Insurance Announces New Chairman for Subsidiary
data.description:
The latest update is out from China Pacific Insurance (Group) Co ( (HK:2601) ).

China Pacific Insurance (Group) Co., Ltd. announced a leadership change at its subsidiary, China Pacific Property Insurance Co., Ltd. (CPIC P/C), with Mr. YU Bin elected as the new chairman, replacing Mr. GU Yue due to age reasons. Mr. YU’s appointment is pending regulatory approval, and he brings extensive experience within the company, having held various senior roles. This change in leadership is expected to influence the strategic direction of CPIC P/C, potentially impacting its market operations and stakeholder relationships.

More about China Pacific Insurance (Group) Co

China Pacific Insurance (Group) Co., Ltd. is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China, operating in the insurance industry. Its primary services include property insurance, life insurance, and asset management, with a focus on the Chinese market.
